div1.entryFree: Unfirm, (three times unfírm, once únfirm before the subst.) not strongly fixed, or loosened: all the sway of earth shakes like a thing u. Caes. I, 3, 4. loose, u. with digging up of graves, Rom. V, 3, 6. In a moral sense, == inconstant: our fancies are more giddy and u. Tw. II, 4, 34. == weak: so is the u. king in three divided, H4B I, 3, 73.
